prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The 41st yearly installment of the APRA Music Awards, commonly referred to as the APRA Awards, is scheduled to take place in 2023. These accolades are presented across several categories within three distinct divisions, and distributed during separate events spread throughout the year: specifically, the APRA Music Awards, the Art Music Awards, and the Screen Music Awards. The APRA Music Awards are bestowed by APRA AMCOS, an acronym representing the Australasian Performing Right Association and the Australasian Mechanical Copyright Owners Society. Their purpose is to recognize exceptional achievements in contemporary music, paying tribute to songwriters and publishers who have demonstrated artistic brilliance and remarkable accomplishments within their respective areas. In January, a selection of 20 songs was revealed as shortlisted contenders for the prestigious Song of the Year award. Subsequently, on March 30, 2023, the definitive nominations were officially released. Furthermore, Colin Hay and Colleen Ironside were announced as the recipients of the 2023 Ted Albert Award, an honour acknowledging their distinguished contributions to Australian Music.
B. The APRA Music Awards of 2023 are the 41st APRA Music Awards series, and they are presented in three distinct categories across three different ceremonies: the APRA Music Awards, Art Music Awards, and Screen Music Awards. The APRA Music Awards are presented by APRA AMCOS (Australasian Performing Right Association and Australasian Mechanical Copyright Owners Society) and celebrate excellence in contemporary music, recognizing songwriters and publishers who have achieved artistic excellence and exceptional success in their fields, with the announcement of 20 songs in January of the final
C. The APRA Music Awards of 2023 are the upcoming 41st annual series, known as the APRA Awards. The awards are given in a series of categories in three divisions and in separate ceremonies throughout the year: the APRA Music Awards, Art Music Awards and Screen Music Awards. The APRA Music Awards are provided by APRA AMCOS (Australasian Performing Right Association and Australasian Mechanical Copyright Owners Society) and celebrate excellence in contemporary music, honouring songwriters and publishers that have achieved artistic excellence and outstanding success in their fields. In January, 20 songs shortlisted for Song of the Year were announced. On 30 March 2023, the final nominations were provided. Winners of the 2023 Ted Albert Award for Outstanding Services to Australian Music were Colin Hay and Colleen Ironside. APRA
